commit_message:
🔒 [security fix] Add default cases to state machines 🔒 [security fix] Add default cases to state machines 🎯 **What:** Added `default` cases to Finite State Machines (FSMs) in `src/mpu_driver.v`, `src/spi_master.v`, and `src/uart_tx.v`.

⚠️ **Risk:** Without a `default` case, an FSM can enter an undefined state due to hardware glitches or signal noise, causing the system to hang or behave unpredictably. This could lead to a denial-of-service or unsafe operation in hardware.

🛡️ **Solution:** Impl

examples.commit_message:
🔒 [security fix] Add default cases to state machines 🔒 [security fix] Add default cases to state machines 🎯 **What:** Added `default` cases to Finite State Machines (FSMs) in `src/mpu_driver.v`, `src/spi_master.v`, and `src/uart_tx.v`.

⚠️ **Risk:** Without a `default` case, an FSM can enter an undefined state due to hardware glitches or signal noise, causing the system to hang or behave unpredictably. This could lead to a denial-of-service or unsafe operation in hardware.

🛡️ **Solution:** Impl

🔒 [security fix] Add default cases to state machines 🔒 [security fix] Add default cases to state machines 🎯 **What:** Added `default` cases to Finite State Machines (FSMs) in `src/mpu_driver.v`, `src/spi_master.v`, and `src/uart_tx.v`.

⚠️ **Risk:** Without a `default` case, an FSM can enter an undefined state due to hardware glitches or signal noise, causing the system to hang or behave unpredictably. This could lead to a denial-of-service or unsafe operation in hardware.

🛡️ **Solution:** Impl
examples.patch:
@@ -103,6 +103,7 @@ module spi_master #(
                         clk_cnt <= clk_cnt + 1;
                     end
                 end
+                default: state <= IDLE;
             endcase
         end
     end

⚠️ **Risk:** Without a `default` case, an FSM can enter an undefined state due to hardware glitches or signal noise, causing the system to hang or behave unpredictably. This could lead to a denial-of-service or unsafe operation in hardware.

🛡️ **Solution:** Impl
examples.patch:
@@ -84,6 +84,7 @@ module uart_tx #(

                     end
